items.name: Node.js runtime
items.current: node:22-trixie-slim builder and distroless Node.js 22 Debian 13 runtime, both digest-pinned / engines >=22
items.releaseGate: Complete the clean signed 15-image staging release and tracker soak; retain Node 22 until uWebSockets.js Node 24 compatibility is proven.

items.name: jose
items.releaseGate: Pin exact version or complete jose 6 migration review with auth/token regression tests.

items.name: uWebSockets.js
items.releaseGate: Validate Node 22/24 native binary compatibility and tracker WebSocket soak before launch.

items.name: ffmpeg
items.current: Alpine 3.23 ffmpeg in digest-pinned node:22-alpine3.23 runtime after apk upgrade
items.pinning: immutable base digest; packages upgraded at image build
items.releaseGate: Pass clean image scan, production-image packaging/playback smokes, and the signed staging release.

items.name: nginx
items.current: nginx:1.29.8-alpine3.23-slim custom image after apk upgrade
items.releaseGate: Pass origin/edge config and playback smokes, clean scans, real TLS evidence, and the signed staging release.

items.name: Prometheus
items.pinning: immutable upstream digest in release workflow
items.releaseGate: Pass clean scan, alert validation, monitoring smoke, and the signed staging release.

items.name: Alertmanager
items.current: Alertmanager v0.33.1 source at commit 2c8da51 with Go 1.26.5 and golang.org/x/crypto v0.53.0
items.pinning: immutable source commit, UI checksum, builder digest, and runtime digest
items.releaseGate: Pass clean scan, receiver fire-drill, and the signed staging release.

items.name: Grafana
items.current: Grafana v13.1.0 source at commit b309c9b rebuilt with Go 1.26.5; unused Tempo backend excluded
items.pinning: immutable source commit, builder digest, and runtime digest
items.releaseGate: Pass clean scan, dashboard/health smokes, and the signed staging release.

items.name: node_exporter
items.pinning: immutable upstream digest in release workflow
items.releaseGate: Pass clean scan, edge metrics scrape, and the signed staging release.

items.name: coturn
items.pinning: immutable source commit and base digest rebuilt, scanned, and signed by the release workflow
items.releaseGate: Pass clean scan, authenticated UDP/TLS relay smoke, capacity measurement, and signed staging publication.

items.name: NATS JetStream server and Node clients
items.pinning: exact npm versions and immutable server image digest
items.releaseGate: Pass three-node TLS/quorum, one-node-loss, persistence, latency, scan, SBOM, and credential-scope evidence.

items.name: NATS Prometheus exporter
items.pinning: immutable upstream image digest mirrored by the release workflow
items.releaseGate: Pass clean scan and verify broker health, storage, API-error, and slow-consumer metrics.

items.name: Android Gradle Plugin
items.releaseGate: Install Android SDK/Gradle, run debug and release builds, then decide whether to move to AGP 9.x.

items.name: Kotlin Gradle plugins
items.releaseGate: Compile Android app and review Kotlin 2.4 migration after Gradle tooling is available.

items.name: AndroidX Media3
items.releaseGate: Run playback soak on real devices and evaluate upgrade to current stable Media3.

items.name: OkHttp
items.releaseGate: Evaluate OkHttp 5 migration after Android compile and tracker/auth integration tests pass.

items.name: Stream WebRTC Android
items.releaseGate: Upgrade or explicitly waive after multi-device WebRTC/DataChannel transfer and license review.

items.name: Backblaze JavaReedSolomon GF(2^8)
items.pinning: immutable git commit through group-restricted JitPack
items.releaseGate: Complete MIT license approval, security review, malformed-packet fuzzing, Android decode/allocation/battery benchmarks, and real-device hash-verified swarm validation before enabling RLNC in release config.
